sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, date_value Date);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, date_value) VALUES (1, reinterpretAsDate(18262));
SELECT id, reinterpretAsDate(date_value) AS interpreted_date FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET date_value = reinterpretAsDate(16000) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, reinterpretAsDate(CAST('2021-01-01' AS UInt32)) AS new_date FROM test_dates;
